basic_details.job_title: GGV Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya (GGV) has officially announced the Research Associate Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates holding a postgraduate degree in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks along with NET/ M.Phil./ Ph.D. and a minimum of two years of research experience can submit their applications through email on or before 31 July 2026. The recruitment is on a contractual basis. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks along with NET/ M.Phil./ Ph.D. and at least two years of research experience.
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks along with NET/ M.Phil./ Ph.D. and at least two years of research experience.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download GGV Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: GGV Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the GGV Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download GGV Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Postgraduate degree in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks along with NET/ M.Phil./ Ph.D. and at least two years of research experience.

content_sections.heading: GGV Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
GGV Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
GGV Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GGV Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GGV Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. and a minimum of two years of research experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 47,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Research Associate at Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya.

faq.question: Q7. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via Email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Research Associate is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya located?
faq.answer: Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya is located in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 495009.

faq.question: Q10. When is the online interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The online interview for the Research Associate position is scheduled for 04th August 2026.
